title: Little Bat Crosshair
description: Bats are for life, not just for Halloween!
body:
Change your crosshair to a cute little bat friend!

Remember bats are for live not just for Halloween <3

May also work for later versions (tried and tested on 1.21.10)

Any issues at all please let me know, thank you! Enjoy!

![Bat Crosshair in action!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a41a0f7f00e6be6735dcf90419f3fd6dee83165.jpeg)
